entries.d:
The sound of air kissing
Also used to describe a chic restaurant or bar frequented by "beautiful people" (esp. media/fashion/art types), when it is often shortened to a single "mwah"
> "I went to the Ivy last night"
> "How was it?"
> "Totally mwah mwah!"
